coreTruthSet.description: The working core theme is defined as maternal stewardship of power transfer within the Red River system.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Working Core Theme: The Mothers Who Hold the River.

coreTruthSet.description: Primary structure is mother-first-matriarch and daughter-second-matriarch, with the relationship carrying system revelation.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: The entire book is their relationship. The system is revealed through their lives.

coreTruthSet.description: Book 1 is explicitly framed as a two-generation matriarchal origin story centered on bridge-lineage formation.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: A two-generation matriarchal origin story of the bridge lineage.

settingAnchors.name: Red River Matriarchal Origin Stage
settingAnchors.description: Primary narrative stage for maternal governance, kinship transfer, and bridge-lineage emergence before major disruption.

continuityConstraints.title: Balance Before Disruption Design Law
continuityConstraints.text: Book 1 must render a fully functioning world first so later disruption reads as consequential rather than cosmetic.

continuityConstraints.title: Mother-to-Daughter Power Transfer Arc
continuityConstraints.text: Authority transfer should move from embodied system memory (mother) to adaptive system evolution (daughter) through relationship-driven scenes.

continuityConstraints.title: Observer Child Perception Advantage
continuityConstraints.text: Non-heir positioning creates observational bandwidth; leadership emergence is built from accumulated pattern-reading, not title inheritance.

openResearchGaps.title: What specific loss and responsibility markers trigger the daughter’s transition into second matriarch leadership?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to make the arc legible and earned across the 1660s-1680s timeline.

openResearchGaps.title: Which scene set best demonstrates the mother as system-in-human-form without reducing her to exposition?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to preserve cinematic character depth while establishing governance mechanics.

openResearchGaps.title: Which closing signals best indicate approaching French pressure without collapsing Book 1 into colonial-contact narrative too early?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to hit the designed threshold ending while preserving Book 1’s internal-world focus.
